ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "group_category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic group */,
  "group_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance factor for the demographic group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "education_level_type" TEXT /* Type of education level */,
  "education_duration" INTEGER /* Typical duration of the education level in years */,
  "education_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "marital_status_type" TEXT /* Type of marital status */,
  "marital_status_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "occupation_category" TEXT /* Category of the occupation */,
  "occupation_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the occupation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship */,
  "relationship_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "race_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the race */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "sex_type" TEXT /* Type of sex */,
  "sex_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "country_continent" TEXT /* Continent of the native country */,
  "country_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the native country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Range of the income level */,
  "income_description" TEXT /* A more detailed description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model */,
  "model_evaluation" TEXT /* Summary of the model evaluation */,
  "model_trained_on" TEXT /* Date the model was trained on */,
  "model_updated_on" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model performance was recorded */,
  "performance_version" TEXT /* Version of the performance metrics */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the performance metrics */,
  "performance_updated_on" TEXT /* Date the performance metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "adult_census_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the adult census data */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the model in its prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model prediction was made */,
  "prediction_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction */,
  "prediction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the prediction */,
  "prediction_updated_on" TEXT /* Date the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time the model was accessed */,
  "log_action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "log_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
